meaning: n.双胞胎中一人,孪生子adj.双胞胎的,一对的,相似的vi.生双胞胎,成对vt.孪生,使成对
examples: We are the 1346th-ranked Deadly Twin Stars.
I can't tell one twin from the other.
Can you tell Tom from his twin brother?
People often confuse me and my twin sister.
They have twin girls and live on a small horse farm in north Georgia.
